response.justification: The candidate meets the minimum bar with roughly 18 years of hands-on software engineering across web, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, plus recent AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP tooling, agentic frameworks) and a long-running open-source platform he founded. However, the role is a director-level strategy position requiring recognized AI expertise and engineering leadership at scale; his trajectory is that of a strong senior/staff IC and craftsman, with no demonstrated AI products of note, no advanced AI degree, and no evidence of advising executives or driving organization-level technical strategy.
strengths: 18+ years of broad engineering experience spanning backend, frontend, mobile, and embedded systems
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work at re:cinq
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform with real-world adoption, showing entrepreneurial initiative
concerns: No principal/director-level scope — career has stayed at senior/staff IC on product teams
AI experience is recent and tooling-focused, not the recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products the role prefers
No evidence of cloud/AI strategy work, executive advising, or influencing at the organizational level

key_factors.factor: Long, broad engineering experience with entrepreneurial track record
